name: industrial_safety_model_based_triage_redwood_ind_col
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Industrial Safety, the situation tagged internally around industrial safety model based triage redwood ind col has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Mei Petrov
agents.identity: I am Mei Petrov, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Industrial Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Harper Diallo
agents.identity: I am Harper Diallo, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Industrial Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of collective.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of individual even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Mei Petrov must choose under individual versus collective. What does Mei Petrov do?
